description:
## Goal

Define the schema for `chunking/{tradition}/{text_id}.toml` configs that drive the chunker. Every text in the corpus needs one of these, so the schema must cover every splitter strategy used in v1.

## Schema Sections

- `[chunking]` — `strategy` (one of `regex`, `heading`, `paragraph`), `pattern` / `heading_pattern`, `section_label_format` (e.g. `"Logion {n}"`), `max_tokens` (default 800), `group_size` (verses/sections to bundle per chunk).
- `[metadata]` — `tradition`, `text_name`, `translator`, `sections_format` (e.g. `"logion"`, `"tractate.section"`).

## Deliverable

A documented schema (in-repo doc or example file) that the splitter implementations and `chunk.py` orchestrator can rely on. Should match the sample configs in docs/guru-implementation.md §"Stage 2".

## Acceptance Criteria

- Schema covers all three v1 splitter strategies (regex, heading, paragraph-grouping)
- Schema captures every field needed to build `[Tradition | Text | Section]` citations
- Example config validates against the schema
